Science.subtitle: Science & Certifications
Science.title: Backed by Science, Trusted by Experts
Science.description: Every drop is laboratory-tested and certified for your peace of mind.

nutrition.title: Nutritional Excellence
nutrition.description: Rich in branched-chain amino acids (BCAA), carnosine, and bromelain. 0% fat, 0% cholesterol, no growth hormones. The scientific choice for post-surgery recovery, maternal nourishment, and daily wellness.

Testimonials.subtitle: Customer Stories
Testimonials.title: Trusted by Families Across Singapore
Testimonials.description: Real stories from real customers who have experienced the Aqina difference.

customer1.text: "First sip was amazing! Absolutely no 'weird taste' at all, just like a freshly brewed rich chicken soup."

customer2.text: "Even during severe pregnancy nausea, this taste was acceptable. The Halal certification gives me peace of mind while drinking."

customer3.text: "It's absolutely amazing for cooking noodles! So delicious that I drank up all the soup!"

FAQ.subtitle: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.title: Common Questions
FAQ.description: Quick answers to help you understand Aqina better.

q1.question: How to consume for best results?
q1.answer: Recommend one pack daily, best taken on an empty stomach in the morning for optimal absorption. Tear open and drink directly, tastes even better when warmed.

q2.question: Who is this suitable for?
q2.answer: Office workers, night owls, pregnant and postpartum mothers, post-surgery recovery individuals, and students.

q3.question: What is the return policy?
q3.answer: We support returns within 7 days after signing (limited to quality issues such as off-flavor, leakage, shipping errors, unused condition).

FAQ.moreHelp: Still have questions? We're here to help!

ProblemSolution.subtitle: The Problem & Our Solution
ProblemSolution.title: Say Goodbye to Bitter, Hello to Vitality

urban.title: Urban Vitality
urban.subtitle: For the Busy Professional
urban.problem: Singapore urbanites often feel exhausted and stressed. Traditional chicken soup has a bitter, gamey taste that makes you "hold your nose" to drink.
urban.solution: Say goodbye to bitterness, awaken your vitality. Aqina uses MD2 pineapple enzyme circular ecosystem farming, double-boiled with steam extraction. No water added, zero moisture, no gamey taste. Every sip is fresh and rich like soup—ending the days of holding your nose to drink chicken essence.

mother.title: Mother's Care
mother.subtitle: For Expecting & New Mothers
mother.problem: Need scientific nourishment during pregnancy but worried about safety?
mother.solution: Specially formulated for pregnant and postpartum mothers. No hormones, rich in carnosine. The taste that even severe nausea can accept—Halal certified for peace of mind.

story.title: Ancient Method, Modern Care
story.subtitle: 8 Hours of Pure Dedication
story.description: Our chicken essence is brewed using a sacred tradition passed down through generations. We use only premium free-range chickens, double-boiled with no added water, salt, or preservatives.

policy.title: Return & Refund Policy
policy.content: We offer a 7-day return policy for quality issues. Products must be unopened and in original packaging. Contact us via WhatsApp for assistance.

footer.tagline: A Heritage of Vitality, Made for Singapore.
